Homebrew Formulae

zim

Install command:

Graphical text editor used to maintain a collection of wiki pages

https://zim-wiki.org/

License: GPL-2.0-or-later

Development: Pull requests

Formula JSON API: /api/formula/zim.json

Formula code: zim.rb on GitHub

Bottle (binary package) installation support provided.

Current versions:

stable ✅ 0.77.0
head ⚡️ HEAD

Depends on:

adwaita-icon-theme 50.0 Icons for the GNOME project
graphviz 15.0.0 Graph visualization software from AT&T and Bell Labs
gtk+3 3.24.52 Toolkit for creating graphical user interfaces
gtksourceview4 4.8.4 Text view with syntax, undo/redo, and text marks
pygobject3 3.56.3 GNOME Python bindings (based on GObject Introspection)
python@3.14 3.14.6 Interpreted, interactive, object-oriented programming language

Depends on when building from source:

pkgconf 2.5.1 Package compiler and linker metadata toolkit
python-setuptools 82.0.1 Easily download, build, install, upgrade, and uninstall Python packages
